page.heroTitle: See where an agent spent time, cost, and coordination effort.
page.heroLead: ClawScope brings OpenClaw, Claude Code, and Codex traces into one replay-first debugger for practical investigation.
heroHighlights: Normalize multiple runtimes into one viewer contract.
Keep time, cost, and actor structure visible together.
Inspect traces locally without cloud dependence.
Move from demo replay to real database-backed debugging quickly.
page.sideTitle: Build the debugger around stable evidence, not retrospective storytelling.

priorities.title: Replay-first
priorities.body: Start from persisted traces so the product proves reconstruction before live streaming.

priorities.title: Local-first
priorities.body: Keep sensitive traces inspectable on the local machine, with no dashboard dependency.

priorities.title: Contract-first
priorities.body: Separate raw evidence, normalized model, and derived interpretation with hard boundaries.

priorities.title: Waterfall-first
priorities.body: Prioritize debugging questions about order, waiting, overlap, and spend before secondary analytics.

page.workflowTitle: Move from local artifacts to evidence-backed inspection.

workflowSteps.title: Collect
workflowSteps.body: Import local artifacts from supported runtimes.

workflowSteps.title: Normalize
workflowSteps.body: Map them into a shared trace contract.

workflowSteps.title: Inspect
workflowSteps.body: Use synchronized waterfall and multi-agent views.

workflowSteps.title: Trace back
workflowSteps.body: Keep every summary tied to the underlying evidence.

page.featureTitle: Show the product through the actions it supports.
page.featureLead: The landing page should surface the product’s real operating model quickly: import, inspect, compare, and understand why the run behaved that way.

features.title: Unified trace intake
features.body: Bring OpenClaw, Claude Code, and Codex sessions into one viewer path instead of separate tools.

features.title: Synchronized waterfall
features.body: Keep chat/activity logs and the vertical waterfall in sync so sequence and focus stay legible.

features.title: Integrated multi-agent analysis
features.body: Switch into actor swimlanes and delegation structure inside the same debugger when the trace supports it.

features.title: Focused derived insight
features.body: Summaries help navigation, but they never replace the normalized trace as source truth.

page.statusTitle: The replay debugger is ready; live synchronization is the next expansion point.
page.statusLead: Phase 3 established the product baseline: collector pipeline, normalized storage, demo landing, and server-backed debugger.
page.studioTitle: Use the landing page to replay bundled traces, then move into the backend debugger for real work.
page.studioLead: The landing surface is for product framing and quick replay. The operational surface remains the backend debugger with database-backed traces.
page.demoModeTitle: Bundled replay traces run directly in the shared viewer shell.
page.demoModeBody: This page is for orientation and lightweight replay. Open the backend debugger when you want stored traces, integrated multi-agent analysis, and day-to-day investigation.

traceStudio.needsFreshSource: The trace studio needs a fresh source.
traceStudio.synchronizedBody: Keep the chat/activity log synchronized with the vertical waterfall overview.
traceStudio.multiAgentBody: Inspect actor swimlanes and delegation structure inside the same debugger surface.
traceStudio.loadingTitle: Collecting trace context for the studio.
traceStudio.loadingBody: The demo surface is loading a bundled replay trace.
traceStudio.emptyTitle: No bundled demo trace is selected.
traceStudio.emptyBody: Choose one of the shipped frontend trace assets to replay the viewer directly from the landing page.

summaryPanel.title: Summary
summaryPanel.subtitle: Start with scope, cost, and obvious bottlenecks.

filterPanel.title: Filters
filterPanel.subtitle: Reduce the trace before you inspect details.
filterPanel.searchPlaceholder: Search spans by name, category, or actor...
filterPanel.collapsedHint: The first ten actors stay visible; the rest stay collapsed.

multiAgentTraceView.intro: Swimlanes and actor relationships are now part of the debugger instead of a separate prototype page.
multiAgentTraceView.actorDirectoryHint: Select an actor to isolate its swimlane. Double-click a segment to open full span details.
multiAgentTraceView.noSignals: This trace does not expose enough actor structure for the multi-agent view.
multiAgentTraceView.noSpans: No spans remain after the current filters.
multiAgentTraceView.hierarchyUnavailable: No explicit parent/child delegation edges were preserved in this trace.

synchronizedTraceView.verticalWaterfallBody: Fixed overview of all events. The centered band tracks the visible log window and the bright line marks the active event.
synchronizedTraceView.noSpans: No spans available for synchronized trace view.

page.heroTitle: 看清一个 Agent 把时间、成本和协作精力花在了哪里。
page.heroLead: ClawScope 将 OpenClaw、Claude Code 和 Codex 的追踪统一到同一个 replay-first 调试器里，服务于真实排查。

heroStats.label: 先证明保存追踪的重建能力

heroHighlights: 把多个运行时统一到同一个 viewer contract。
同时保留时间、成本与参与者结构。
在本地检查追踪，不依赖云端仪表盘。
从演示回放快速切换到数据库驱动的真实调试。
page.sideTitle: 调试器必须建立在稳定证据之上，而不是事后故事化解释。

priorities.title: Replay-first
priorities.body: 先从已保存追踪开始，先证明可重建性，再承接 live streaming。

priorities.title: Local-first
priorities.body: 敏感追踪应可在本机直接检查，不依赖外部 dashboard。

priorities.title: Contract-first
priorities.body: Raw evidence、normalized model 和 derived interpretation 之间必须有硬边界。

priorities.title: Waterfall-first
priorities.body: 先回答顺序、等待、重叠和成本问题，再扩展到次级分析能力。

page.workflowTitle: 从本地产物进入基于证据的检查。

workflowSteps.title: 采集
workflowSteps.body: 导入受支持运行时的本地产物。

workflowSteps.title: 检查
workflowSteps.body: 使用同步瀑布图与多 Agent 视图。

workflowSteps.title: 回溯
workflowSteps.body: 让每个摘要都能回到原始证据。

page.featureTitle: 通过产品真正支持的动作来展示它。
page.featureLead: Landing 页面应该让用户很快看懂产品的真实工作方式：导入、检查、比较，并理解运行为什么会这样发生。

features.title: 统一追踪入口
features.body: 把 OpenClaw、Claude Code 与 Codex 会话汇总到同一个 viewer 路径，而不是拆成多套工具。

features.title: 同步瀑布图
features.body: 让聊天/活动日志与垂直瀑布图保持同步，确保顺序和焦点始终清楚。

features.title: 整合式多 Agent 分析
features.body: 当追踪支持参与者结构时，可在同一个调试器里切换到泳道与委派关系视图。

features.title: 克制的派生分析
features.body: 摘要只负责帮助导航，不替代规范化追踪本身作为 source truth。

page.statusTitle: 回放型调试器已经就绪，下一步是 live 同步能力。
page.statusLead: Phase 3 已经建立了当前产品基线：collector pipeline、normalized storage、demo landing，以及后端调试器。
page.studioTitle: 先在 Landing 页面回放内置追踪，再进入后端调试器处理真实工作。
page.studioLead: Landing 页面负责产品表达和轻量回放。真正的操作界面仍然是基于数据库追踪的后端调试器。
page.demoModeTitle: 内置回放追踪直接运行在同一套 viewer shell 上。
page.demoModeBody: 这个页面用于快速理解产品和体验轻量回放。需要已存储追踪、整合式多 Agent 分析和日常排查时，请打开后端调试器。

traceStudio.needsFreshSource: Trace Studio 需要重新连接一个可用来源。
traceStudio.synchronizedBody: 保持聊天/活动日志与右侧垂直瀑布图同步。
traceStudio.multiAgentBody: 在同一个调试器内检查参与者泳道和委派结构。
traceStudio.multiAgentHeading: 整合后的多 Agent 视图
traceStudio.noStoredTraces: 当前没有可用的已存储追踪
traceStudio.loadingTitle: 正在为 Studio 收集追踪上下文。
traceStudio.loadingBody: 演示界面正在加载内置回放追踪。
traceStudio.emptyTitle: 当前没有选中的内置演示追踪。
traceStudio.emptyBody: 请选择一个随包提供的前端追踪资源，直接在 Landing 页面回放 viewer。

demoTraces.openclawNormalizedBasic: 演示：OpenClaw 基础规范化追踪
demoTraces.integratedMultiAgentReplay: 演示：整合后的多 Agent 回放

summaryPanel.title: 摘要
summaryPanel.subtitle: 先看范围、成本，以及最明显的瓶颈。

filterPanel.title: 过滤
filterPanel.subtitle: 先缩小追踪范围，再查看细节。
filterPanel.searchPlaceholder: 按名称、类别或参与者搜索片段...
filterPanel.hiddenSelected: 折叠区里已选择 {count} 个参与者
filterPanel.collapsedHint: 默认只展开前十个参与者，其余保持折叠。

multiAgentTraceView.intro: 泳道与参与者关系现已并入调试器主界面，不再保留独立原型页。
multiAgentTraceView.actorDirectoryHint: 点击参与者可只看该泳道；双击时间段可打开完整详情。
multiAgentTraceView.noSignals: 当前追踪没有足够的参与者结构信号，无法启用多 Agent 视图。
multiAgentTraceView.noSpans: 在当前过滤条件下没有剩余片段。
multiAgentTraceView.hierarchyUnavailable: 该追踪未保留明确的父子委派关系，因此这里只显示扁平参与者列表。

synchronizedTraceView.verticalWaterfallBody: 固定显示所有事件的整体概览。中间高亮带表示当前可见日志窗口，亮线表示当前聚焦事件。
synchronizedTraceView.noSpans: 当前没有可用于同步追踪视图的片段。
